core_principles: Density over Whitespace: Maximize data per pixel without clutter.
Contrast is King: 100% legibility for data points.
Speed Perception: UI must feel instant (optimistic UI updates).
No Fluff: Every pixel must serve a functional purpose.

usage_rules: Use 'surface_primary' for the main app background.
Use 'surface_secondary' for cards, sidebars, and panels.
Use 'border' for 1px borders on all panels.
Primary color ONLY for main actions (Create, Save, Deploy).
Status colors (Success/Error) used sparingly for indicators.

bento_grid_rules: Dashboard must use a high-density Bento Grid.
Hero Metric Cards: col-span-3 (4 cards per row).
All cards must have h-full to align perfectly.

tables.header: bg-[#151F32] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-text_muted py-2

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: None. Use solid colors for performance feel.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Forbidden on backgrounds. Allowed strictly for 'active' borders or micro-interactions.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay allowed on background (opacity 0.02) to reduce banding.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'High Density' philosophy. Do not add unnecessary padding.
Implement the 'SSP Endpoints' page with a secure API Key generation UI (blur the key until clicked).
For the 'Bid Logs', use a virtualized list if possible, or a limited tail view (last 50 items) for performance.
Campaign Targeting must be a multi-tab form (Device, Geo, Inventory).
Ensure the OpenRTB JSON viewer uses syntax highlighting (Prism or simple color-coding).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
